Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SideProofStore

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SideProofStore
public final class SideProofStore extends Object

The only instance of this class DEFAULT_INSTANCE is used to manage performed side proofs.

Side proofs are added via #disposeOrStore(String, ApplyStrategyInfo) when they are no longer needed. If the SideProofStore is enabled (isEnabled()) the side Proof is not disposed; instead it is added via addProof(String, Proof) and available for a later access until it is removed via removeEntries(Collection).
